report.summary: Drafted 2 new social posts (#128-129) covering the Congress tokenization hearing (LIVE today, $26.48B RWA market) and SEC's 16 digital commodities classification thread (BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP + 12 more). Updated newsletter v23 addendum v6 with regulatory clarity mega-narrative — tokenization hearing + SEC commodity framework + CLARITY Act stablecoin deal. Created content calendar v33 (4 posts Wed-Sat). Built 2 SVG social cards (tokenization hearing LIVE dashboard with regulation timeline, SEC 16-asset commodity grid with 5-category framework). Key narrative: 2026 is the regulatory clarity year — first-ever commodity classifications + tokenization hearing + CLARITY Act converging while market sits in extreme fear.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #128 [NEW]: Congress Tokenization Hearing LIVE — $26.48B RWA on-chain, BlackRock/JPMorgan/Franklin Templeton all have live tokenized products, CLARITY Act approaching Senate markup. CTA to tokenized-real-world-assets-guide-2026 (scheduled Wed Mar 25 12PM ET — same-day timely post)

Tweet #129 [NEW]: SEC 16 Digital Commodities Thread (4 parts) — BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, DOGE, ADA, AVAX, LINK, DOT, HBAR, LTC, BCH, SHIB, XLM, XTZ, APT classified as commodities. 5-category framework. Staking/mining/airdrops excluded from securities law. CTA to crypto-regulations-2026 (scheduled Sat Mar 29 11AM ET)
Tweets #125-127: Carried from v5 — miner capitulation, $2.5B ETF inflows, SEC securities definitions (Wed-Fri schedule unchanged)

Newsletter v23 addendum v6: Added regulatory clarity mega-section — tokenization hearing + SEC 16-asset classification + CLARITY Act stablecoin deal 99% done. New subject line emphasizing regulation angle.
Discord/Telegram mid-week update v6: BTC $70,600, F&G 34, tokenization hearing today, SEC commodities, $2.5B ETF inflows, CLARITY Act stablecoin deal
Content calendar v33: 4 posts Wed-Sat (tokenization today, miner capitulation Wed, ETF inflows Thu, SEC commodities Sat) + Discord volatility alert for Thu morning options expiry

sections.title: Growth Trajectory Analysis
items: BREAKOUT: Regulatory clarity narrative — SEC 16-asset commodity classification (Mar 17) + Congress tokenization hearing (Mar 25) + CLARITY Act stablecoin deal 99% done. This is the biggest cluster of crypto regulatory events in US history. Triple search interest driver.

PEAK: Institutional vs retail divergence intensifies — $2.5B ETF inflows (4 straight positive weeks), Morgan Stanley MSBT filing, YTD outflows shrunk from -$6.4B to -$210M. Smart money accumulating during 46+ day extreme fear streak.
CATALYST: $13.5B options expiry Thursday Mar 27 — max pain around $70K creates high-volatility content window.
EMERGING: Tokenized RWAs — $26.48B on-chain (+5.25% 30d). Congressional hearing today legitimizes the narrative. BlackRock, JPMorgan, Franklin Templeton all have live products.
SUSTAINED: Miner capitulation at $88K production cost vs $70.6K market. Historic pattern: every prior capitulation preceded major recovery.
TIME-SENSITIVE: Tax guides — 21 days to April 15. Entering peak search volume window.
BLOCKED: 170+ pages still behind git lock. Deploy gap Day 8 limits indexing of new regulation content.
